caption: Figure 12.8: Top tuna fishing nations based on landings of seven tuna species in 2018. Long description.
description: A horizontal bar chart titled 'Top 10 tuna fishing nations (2018)' showing catch in metric tons. Indonesia leads with nearly 600,000 tons, followed by Japan, Papua New Guinea, Taiwan, Spain, Ecuador, Republic of Korea, USA, Kiribati, and the Philippines.
